# Trion Creation Sdn Bhd

> Custom software development company in Malaysia. We build any system you need — fast, modern and fully customised. Mobile apps, web apps, ERP, CRM, AI automation, blockchain, POS, booking, loan management, inventory and Odoo customisation. 150+ projects delivered, 5+ years experience, 98% client satisfaction.

Trion Creation Sdn Bhd is a Malaysia-based software house headquartered in Kuala Lumpur. We are part of Lumiso Group Sdn Bhd. We deliver custom-built systems for SMEs and enterprises across Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand and Indonesia. Our portfolio includes the Yippi social media super app (5M+ users), Colorverse Web3 platform (endorsed by Malaysia Tourism Board), DDDrive transport platform, MyCashOut loan system, ThaiAdvocates legal case management and the ReSkills online education platform.

We are an official Alibaba Cloud Partner and a recognised MDEC (Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation) digital innovation partner.

## Contact

- Company: Trion Creation Sdn Bhd
- Website: https://trioncreation.com

- Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
- Founder: Freddy Chia
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/trioncreation-sdn-bhd
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/trionc.creation
- Languages: English, Malay, Chinese
- Business hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 MYT

## Languages

This website is available in three languages. Each version is fully translated and separately indexable:

- English (default): https://trioncreation.com/
- 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese): https://trioncreation.com/zh/
- Bahasa Malaysia (Malay): https://trioncreation.com/ms/

Service and portfolio pages exist in all three languages under the same path prefix (e.g. https://trioncreation.com/zh/services/ and https://trioncreation.com/ms/services/).

## Services

- [Mobile & Web App Development](https://trioncreation.com/services/mobile-web-app-development.html): Full-stack development of scalable mobile and web applications with modern frameworks and cloud-native architecture.
- [ERP & CRM Development](https://trioncreation.com/services/erp-crm-development.html): Custom Enterprise Resource Planning and Customer Relationship Management systems tailored to your business workflow.
- [AI Automation & Chatbot](https://trioncreation.com/services/ai-automation-chatbot.html): Intelligent automation systems and conversational AI chatbots that enhance customer engagement and streamline operations.
- [Odoo Customisation](https://trioncreation.com/services/odoo-customisation.html): Tailored Odoo ERP solutions with custom modules, workflows, and integrations to match your business needs.
- [POS & Inventory Management](https://trioncreation.com/services/pos-inventory-management.html): Complete Point of Sale systems with real-time inventory tracking, multi-location support, and comprehensive reporting.
- [Booking System Development](https://trioncreation.com/services/booking-system-development.html): Custom booking and reservation systems for appointments, services, events and resource management.
- [Loan Management System](https://trioncreation.com/services/loan-management-system.html): Complete loan application and management systems with automated processing, credit scoring and repayment tracking.
- [API Integration & Development](https://trioncreation.com/services/api-integration-development.html): Custom API development and third-party integrations to connect your systems and streamline data flow.
- [Blockchain & Web3 Solutions](https://trioncreation.com/services/blockchain-web3-solutions.html): End-to-end Web3 platform development with multi-chain support, NFT integration, and smart contract automation.
- [AR/VR & Metaverse Development](https://trioncreation.com/services/ar-vr-metaverse-development.html): Immersive virtual experiences and metaverse applications using Unity, Spatial and cutting-edge VR/AR technologies.
- [Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps](https://trioncreation.com/services/cloud-infrastructure-devops.html): Scalable cloud solutions with cross-border CDN, real-time video processing, and 99%+ uptime guarantee.
- [Product Design & UX](https://trioncreation.com/services/product-design-ux.html): User-centred design with modern interfaces, seamless user experiences and data-driven design decisions.


## Pricing

- MVP: RM15,000 – RM40,000 (6–12 weeks)
- Mid-size business system: RM40,000 – RM150,000 (3–4 months)
- Enterprise platform: RM150,000+ (3–6 months)
- Monthly support retainer available after launch
- Clients own 100% of source code and data
- Fixed-scope quotes provided after a free discovery call

## Technology stack

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, HTML5/CSS3
- Backend: Node.js, Laravel, PHP, Express.js, REST API, GraphQL
- Mobile: Flutter, React Native, Swift (iOS), Kotlin (Android), cross-platform
- Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Firebase, Prisma
- ERP & Business: Odoo, custom ERP, workflow automation, Power BI
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Alibaba Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Nginx
- AI & ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenAI API, NLP, chatbot development
- Blockchain & Web3: Ethereum, Solidity, Web3.js, smart contracts, NFT development
- Payment & Integration: Stripe, PayPal, iPay88, payment gateway APIs

## Case studies

- [Yippi Social Media Super App](https://trioncreation.com/projects/yippi.html): Multi-feature community platform scaled to 5M+ users with messaging, content feed, rewards, live streaming and cross-border CDN.
- [Colorverse Web3 Social-Fi Platform](https://trioncreation.com/projects/colorverse.html): Multi-chain NFT launchpad and Social-Fi platform endorsed by Malaysia Tourism Board.
- [DDDrive Driver Services Platform](https://trioncreation.com/projects/dddrive.html): Real-time dispatch, GPS tracking, route optimisation and multi-city fleet operations.

## Industries served

- Social media and community platforms
- Finance, lending and fintech
- Logistics, transport and dispatch
- Legal and professional services
- Human resources and payroll
- Retail and F&B (POS, e-menu, loyalty)
- Online education and e-learning
- Theme parks and entertainment imaging
- Web3, blockchain and NFT
- Tourism and hospitality

## Common questions

**How long to build a custom system?** MVPs take 6–12 weeks. Enterprise systems take 3–6 months.

**Do you build mobile and web?** Yes — native iOS/Android, PWA, admin dashboards, backend APIs, cloud infrastructure as one integrated stack.

**Can you customise or migrate from existing systems?** Yes — Odoo, WordPress, Laravel, legacy PHP. Full data migration, re-platforming, feature extension without downtime.

**How much does a custom software project cost?** MVPs RM15k–40k, mid-size RM40k–150k, enterprise RM150k+. Fixed-scope quote after discovery call.

**Do you provide ongoing support?** Yes — warranty period included, monthly retainers for bug fixes, security patches, server monitoring, feature updates, 24/7 critical incident response.

**Who owns the source code?** Clients own 100% of source code and data. NDAs signed. Deploy to your own AWS, Alibaba Cloud or on-premise infrastructure if preferred.
